def eligible_for_study_abroad_program(self) -> bool:
        if 18 <= self.age <= 35 and self.GPA > 3.0 and self.language_proficiency == LanguageProficiency.ADVANCED \
            and self.employment_status != EmploymentStatus.UNEMPLOYED \
            and self.marital_status != MaritalStatus.MARRIED \
            and self.religion != Religion.ATHEIST \
            and self.race != Race.INDIAN \
            and self.education in [Education.BACHELOR, Education.MASTER, Education.DOCTOR]:
            return True
        else:
            return False
